title: Irish Apple Crumble
description: A classic dessert featuring tender apples topped with a crunchy oat mixture. Serve warm with vanilla ice cream.
instructions: Peel, core, and slice the apples. Place them in a 9x9-inch baking dish.
In a large bowl, combine the flour, oats, brown sugar, cold butter, Irish, and cinnamon. Mix until crumbly.
Spread the crumble mixture evenly over the apples.
Bake for 35-40 minutes or until the topping is golden brown and the apples are tender.
Serve warm with vanilla ice cream, if desired.
